scripts.postinstall: cd ContentfulDemoBase && npm install && cd ../ContentfulDemoOptimized && npm install
scripts.start:
npm run prebuild && echo '
✅ Setup complete! Start an app with one of:

  npm run start:base                Base app (Expo Go)
  npm run start:optimized           Optimized app (iOS native build)
  npm run start:optimized:android   Optimized app (Android native build)
'
